analysis.name: Tensor
analysis.summary: TNSR是Solana上领先的NFT市场Tensor的治理代币，近期价格大幅上涨但24小时回调，基本面有协议收入支撑，但全稀释估值较高，流通量仅33%，存在解锁风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破0.03美元或出现大额解锁公告

catalysts: Solana NFT市场回暖，Tensor占据60-70%市场份额
Vector社交交易应用快速增长，年化交易量75亿美元
协议费用50%归TNSR金库，潜在价值捕获

latestNews.title: Tensor Price Prediction 2026, 2027-2030: Will TNSR Rise?
latestNews.reason: 预测类文章，无实质利好

latestNews.title: Tensor (TNSR) Price Explodes 342% in Bearish Market—Here’s What Might Be Behind It
latestNews.reason: 历史大涨说明市场关注度高

latestNews.title: TNSR Jumps 80% Despite Crypto Slump, Sparking Concerns Over Centralization

fundamentals: Tensor是Solana上最大的NFT市场，市场份额60-70%
Vector社交交易应用年化交易量75亿美元，日活2万
协议费用50%归TNSR金库，年化费用约3750万美元
总供应量10亿，流通3.35亿（33%），全稀释市值约3550万美元
marketRead: Meteora DEX上流动性5848万美元，交易量仅3.99美元，流动性深度好但交易冷清
价格从ATH 2.23美元下跌98.4%，当前0.0355美元
risks: 全稀释估值与流通市值差距大，未来解锁压力
NFT市场整体低迷，依赖Solana生态复苏
代币中心化担忧，团队持有大量未解锁代币
24小时交易量极低，可能存在流动性风险
watchlist: TNSR解锁时间表及团队持仓变动
sourceNotes: 价格数据来自Meteora DEX，与CEX可能有价差
新闻多为2025年11月，时效性一般
基本面数据来自项目描述，需验证

profile.name: Tensor
profile.description: The TNSR token governs the protocols underlying Tensor and Vector. 50% of protocol fees from both products accrue to the TNSR treasury. Tensor launched in July 2022 and is the leading NFT marketplace on Solana, commanding 60-70% of Solana NFT market share. It gained momentum by catering to NFTs traders instead of just collectors with real-time data, pro charting tools, and a fast terminal interface. Vector is the leading social trading app in crypto. Within 3 months of launch, it grew to $7.5 billion of annualized volume and 20k daily active users, both of which are doubling every 1-2 weeks. It generates $75M/year in fees of which 50% goes directly to the TNSR treasury.
